summary: Tested Straddle Compass (Phase 1) end-to-end: backend signal GET/PUT + auto-derive, frontend compass render on /alpha-terminal, scanner accordion (momentum open by default, others collapsed → Coming Soon on click), admin panel update flow, regression on momentum table + mobile 390px overflow. All 8 backend tests pass. All frontend flows pass. Demo state left as Bullish per instructions.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The default seed note 'Awaiting live straddle data.' contrasts with DEFAULT_SIGNAL only being inserted on first startup — any bias/legs changes seeded originally can't be re-seeded easily. Acceptable for Phase 1.
Backend PUT /api/terminal/signal always overrides box_size/reversal to constants; if these are meant to be config-driven later, expose them in SignalUpdate.
Frontend Admin select uses value=Bullish/Bearish/Neutral but displays Rising/Falling/Flat for legs — clear UX; keep in mind for accessibility (label-value mismatch). Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: None. Restored signal to Bullish demo (bias=Bullish, up_trend=Bearish/Falling, down_trend=Bullish/Rising, spot=24,000 atm=24000 up_strike=24200 down_strike=23800, note='ATM+200 falling, ATM-200 rising — bullish setup.').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signal collection = db.nifty_signal doc id='current'. Auto-derive only fires when payload.bias=='Neutral'. Admin select trend values are Bullish/Bearish/Neutral (displayed as Rising/Falling/Flat). Frontend URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Phase 2 Definedge integration NOT in scope yet.
verified_flows: GET /api/terminal/signal (public) returns all required fields, no _id leak
PUT /api/terminal/signal 401 without token; 401 with invalid token
Auto-derive: Neutral+up=Bearish+down=Bullish => Bullish; Neutral+up=Bullish+down=Bearish => Bearish; Neutral+Neutral+Neutral => Neutral; explicit Bullish stays Bullish
Frontend /alpha-terminal: straddle-compass + compass-bias render, reflects backend signal (BULLISH)
Accordion: momentum open by default with rows visible; relative_strength collapsed, coming-soon appears only after click
Admin login → admin-signal-panel visible → set bias Bearish → toast → API reflects Bearish; then restore Neutral with legs → auto-derived Bullish persisted → /alpha-terminal reflects BULLISH
Regression: momentum table shows NVDA/CRWD/PLTR desktop; mobile 390px shows momentum-card-0, no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390)
